  1. model

Uses of Package
model

Packages that use model
Package
Description
controller
 
model
 
view
 
  • Classes in model used by controller
    Class
    Description
    Game
    Central class that manages the entire Monopoly game state.
    LandSlot
    Represents a purchasable land property on the board.
    Player
    Represents one player in the game.
    Slot
    Abstract base class for all slots on the board.
  • Classes in model used by model
    Class
    Description
    Board
    Represents the game board with 40 slots.
    LandSlot
    Represents a purchasable land property on the board.
    Player
    Represents one player in the game.
    Slot
    Abstract base class for all slots on the board.

    Description
    Game
    Central class that manages the entire Monopoly game state.
    LandSlot
    Represents a purchasable land property on the board.
